content.en:
The human world.

Ye Tian began to sort out the treasure resources obtained from the Devouring Clan, and the cultivation resources alone were enough for the Clan to pile up more than ten Invincible Dao Ancestors.

There are also many treasures that are difficult to identify, and their value is also very great.

In addition, Ye Tian also obtained a complete forbidden stone tablet.

At the beginning, Ouyang Jiu'er gave him a forbidden stone tablet fragment, which made him excited, and with the help of that forbidden stone tablet fragment, he realized the forbidden way.

And now, the value of this complete forbidden stone tablet can be imagined.

That is to say, the Devouring Clan does not cultivate, does not participate in the Forbidden Dao, and the Forbidden Stone Tablet is just an ordinary stone tablet for them to record words, and they don't regard it as a treasure at all, just like an ordinary stone tablet in the eyes of ordinary people.

Immediately.

Ye Tian's forbidden stone tablet was sent to the temple of the human race, except for the guardians of the human race who could participate in enlightenment for free, it was only developed for the high-level and geniuses of the human race, and a certain price must be paid.

In the following days, Ye Tian had been identifying those treasures, and there were almost big surprises every day.

A few months later.

Ye Tian picked up the mysterious black paper and began to study it.

He also tried to break the paper, but was unable to leave a trace on it.

Obviously, this piece of paper is extraordinary.

"The Devourer has been studying for a long time, but it hasn't been studied, and according to the general identification method, it will definitely not work!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he tried to pour the power of the forbidden path into the paper.

Because the Devourer didn't have the forbidden path, he might be able to identify the usefulness of the black paper using the forbidden path.

Rumble!!!!

The power of the forbidden path was poured into the black paper, and soon the black paper changed, and words appeared on it.

These words spread into his body with the power of Ye Tian's forbidden dao and were absorbed by Ye Tian's soul.

Soon, a method appeared in Ye Tian's soul memory.

"Mixed Element Holy Body!"

It is a method of condensing the Eucharist.

If you just look at it from the name, the Mixed Yuan Holy Body seems to be no different from those physique cultivation methods in the Dao Mountain Realm.

However, it is not an ordinary constitution, but a forbidden constitution.

Under normal circumstances, there is no essential difference between the forbidden bodies of the Supreme Dao Ancestors and the Invincible Dao Ancestors, they are all the same.

However, the Holy Body is a high-level version of the Forbidden Body, and the Mixed Element Holy Body is one of them, a top-level Forbidden Body.

For example, with the same ninety percent tempering level, the Mixed Yuan Holy Body easily crushed the ordinary forbidden body, and the two sides could not be compared at all.

"How could there be such a inheritance method as the Mixed Yuan Holy Body in the last civilization era, even Black Wind Mountain definitely did not have such a Holy Body Method!"

Ye Tian muttered.

If Black Wind Mountain had such a Holy Body Method, an invincible Dao Ancestor like him would have been bestowed a long time ago.

And those half-step domain ancestors he knew, the forbidden body was just an ordinary forbidden body, and it was not powerful!

Obviously, the Divine Heaven Realm does not necessarily have the Holy Body Method, and even if there is, it is in the hands of a very small number of domain ancestors, and they are not willing to pass it on easily.

"It is estimated that in the last civilization era, the inheritance of the Holy Body Dharma Sect floated from the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain!"

Ye Tian guessed.

If the cultivators of the previous civilization era really cultivated the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, I am afraid that they would really be able to compete with the Devouring Clan, but it is a pity that this Holy Body Inheritance Method is too difficult to cultivate, and it is also too dangerous, even comparable to the danger of a half-step True Ancestor trying to master the power of the Dark Taboo.

First of all, the Mixed Yuan Holy Body needs to master the twelve forbidden paths, that is, the forbidden path of time, the forbidden path of space, the five basic taboo paths of gold, wood, water, fire, and earth, the taboo path of ice, the taboo path of thunder, the taboo path of wind, the taboo path of light, and the taboo path of darkness.

Once you have mastered these twelve forbidden paths, you can cultivate the Mixed Yuan Holy Body.

But the most difficult thing is that you need to forcibly temper your body with the power of the dark forbidden origin of the twelve forbidden paths before you can cultivate into a mixed element holy body.

And this process is too difficult, and if you are not careful, it will lead to the collapse of the forbidden body, that is, the collapse of the physical body and death.

Which ordinary Dao Ancestor dares to try? Failure is death!

"However, this Mixed Yuan Holy Body is simply a Holy Body prepared for me by nature, others dare not cultivate, but I have the talent of copying, I can copy my own body for cultivation, once I have completely mastered the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, and I am 100% sure that I will successfully practice into the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, it will not be too late for the main body to cultivate again!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

In addition, once he cultivated the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, his forbidden body would probably soon be able to reach the Extreme Dao level.

Originally, Ye Tian was also going to let the Replica Body Devouring Clan Tengfeng act as a spy, but now where is the heart to act as a spy, naturally he is the first time to cultivate the Mixed Yuan Holy Body!

Immediately.

Ye Tian's Devouring Clan's body left the Devouring Realm, but it disintegrated on its own.

Soon after.

Ye Tian once again condensed the copy body, but this time it was his own body.

Wow!

The copy body left the Void Ancient Realm and headed for the Dark Forbidden Realm.

Because if you want to cultivate the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, you must enter the Dark Forbidden Realm, which cannot be practiced in the Dao Mountain Realm.

-------------

Dark Forbidden Realm.

Ye Tian's copy body came here, and continued to go deep into the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain, flying for a long time before stopping.

It's not that he doesn't want to go deeper, but if he continues to fly, the visual and auditory hallucinations he hears are too strong, which will affect his cultivation, and he is also prone to encounter some terrifying things.

So, just practice here.

Ye Tian arranged a large array, took out a Dao platform, sat on it, and began to cultivate the Mixed Yuan Holy Body.

Bang!!!!

The origin of the dark forbidden realm descended, and the power of the twelve forbidden origin paths poured into Ye Tian's body, constantly refining his body when Ye Tian urged the Mixed Yuan Holy Body Condensation Method.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to scream, and the copy body exploded directly.

Failed to practice for the first time!

The human world.

Ye Tian opened his eyes and sighed: "Sure enough, it's not easy to cultivate into a Mixed Yuan Holy Body!"

When the copying talent was able to copy the body again, Ye Tian copied his body again and went to the dark forbidden realm to cultivate again.

In this way, Ye Tian failed again and again, cultivating again and again.

Time passed slowly!
